name: usenetstreamer
description: UsenetStreamer lets you stream any NZB files directly into Stremio. Bring your own sources, connect Prowlarr or NZBHydra, add indexers via built-in Newznab support, or link your Easynews account using the native Easynews indexer. It performs instant health checks on Usenet results and delivers fast, reliable streaming into Stremio.
